---
title: "Causal_Inference"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(gdata)
library(lubridate)
library(comorbidity)
library(table1)
library(bigrquery)
library(DBI)
library(dbplyr)
library(dplyr)
library(broom)
library(patchwork)
library(writexl)

library(MatchIt)

# Reference switch for exposure coding used across all models:
# TRUE  -> NIV is reference (NIV=0, INV=1)
# FALSE -> INV is reference (INV=0, NIV=1)
niv_reference <- FALSE
```

### Pre-processing

```{r,echo=FALSE}

cohort <- fread("sph5104gp.csv")


# confounders <- c(
#   "race", "age", "gender", "meanbp_min", "gcs_min", "gcs_motor_min",
#   "uomlkghr_6hr", "bilirubin_max", "creatinine_max", "platelet_min",
#   "dialysis_active", "ph", "bicarbonate", "potassium", "sofa_24hours",
#   "so2", "po2", "pco2", "fio2", "totalco2", "hematocrit", "hemoglobin",
#   "carboxyhemoglobin", "methemoglobin", "chloride", "calcium",
#   "temperature", "sodium", "lactate", "glucose", "sapsii", "pressor"
# )

confounders <- c(
  "insurance_group","age", "group_solid","group_hematological","group_metastasized""meanbp_min", "gcs_min",
  "bilirubin_max", "creatinine_max", "platelet_min",
  "dialysis_active", "ph", "bicarbonate", "potassium",
  "temperature", "sodium", "glucose", "pressor"
)

required_vars <- c("vent_label_ITT","vent_label_PP","vent_label_sen", confounders, "hospital_expire_flag", "28-day mortality")

data <- cohort %>% select(any_of(required_vars))

exposure_vars <- c("vent_label_ITT", "vent_label_PP", "vent_label_sen")
outcome_vars <- c("28-day mortality", "hospital_expire_flag")

data <- data %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      any_of(exposure_vars),
      ~ case_when(
        as.character(.) == "1" ~ "INV",
        as.character(.) == "0" ~ "NIV",
        TRUE ~ as.character(.)
      )
    ),
    across(
      any_of(outcome_vars),
      ~ case_when(
        as.character(.) == "1" ~ "death",
        as.character(.) == "0" ~ "alive",
        TRUE ~ as.character(.)
      )
    )
  )


```

### Multiple Imputation

```{r,echo=FALSE}

impute_data <- data

exclude_vars <- c("vent_label_ITT", "vent_label_PP", "vent_label_sen", "28-day mortality", "hospital_expire_flag")

meth <- mice::make.method(impute_data)
pred <- mice::make.predictorMatrix(impute_data)
meth[] <- ""

na_vars <- names(which(colSums(is.na(impute_data)) > 0))
impute_vars <- setdiff(na_vars, exclude_vars)

for (v in impute_vars) {
  x_non_na <- impute_data[[v]][!is.na(impute_data[[v]])]
  if (length(x_non_na) == 0 || length(unique(x_non_na)) <= 1) next
  if (is.numeric(impute_data[[v]])) {
    meth[v] <- "pmm"
  } else if (is.factor(impute_data[[v]]) && nlevels(impute_data[[v]]) == 2) {
    meth[v] <- "logreg"
  } else if (is.factor(impute_data[[v]])) {
    meth[v] <- "polyreg"
  } else {
    meth[v] <- "pmm"
  }
}

keep_exclude <- intersect(exclude_vars, names(impute_data))
meth[keep_exclude] <- ""
pred[keep_exclude, ] <- 0
pred[, keep_exclude] <- 0

set.seed(5104)
imp <- mice::mice(
  data = impute_data,
  m = 5,
  maxit = 20,
  method = meth,
  predictorMatrix = pred,
  ridge = 1e-03,
  printFlag = FALSE
)

data_imputed <- mice::complete(imp, action = 1)
exclude_front <- data %>% select(any_of(exclude_vars))
data_imputed <- data_imputed %>% select(-any_of(exclude_vars))
data_imputed <- bind_cols(exclude_front, data_imputed)
```

### Data Split
```{r,echo = FALSE}
exposures <- c("vent_label_ITT", "vent_label_PP", "vent_label_sen")
outcomes <- c("28-day mortality", "hospital_expire_flag")

required_split_cols <- unique(c(exposures, outcomes, confounders))
missing_split_cols <- setdiff(required_split_cols, names(data_imputed))
if (length(missing_split_cols) > 0) {
  stop(paste("Missing columns in data_imputed:", paste(missing_split_cols, collapse = ", ")))
}

make_analysis_data <- function(exposure, outcome, df, confounders) {
  vars <- unique(c(exposure, outcome, confounders))
  df %>%
    select(all_of(vars)) %>%
    filter(!is.na(.data[[exposure]]), !is.na(.data[[outcome]]))
}

data_itt_28 <- make_analysis_data("vent_label_ITT", "28-day mortality", data_imputed, confounders)
data_itt_discharge <- make_analysis_data("vent_label_ITT", "hospital_expire_flag", data_imputed, confounders)
data_pp_28 <- make_analysis_data("vent_label_PP", "28-day mortality", data_imputed, confounders)
data_pp_discharge <- make_analysis_data("vent_label_PP", "hospital_expire_flag", data_imputed, confounders)
data_sen_28 <- make_analysis_data("vent_label_sen", "28-day mortality", data_imputed, confounders)
data_sen_discharge <- make_analysis_data("vent_label_sen", "hospital_expire_flag", data_imputed, confounders)

```

### PSM
```{r,echo = FALSE}
if (!requireNamespace("MatchIt", quietly = TRUE)) {
  stop("Package 'MatchIt' is required. Please install it with install.packages('MatchIt').")
}

psm_inputs <- list(
  itt_28 = list(data = data_itt_28, exposure = "vent_label_ITT", outcome = "28-day mortality"),
  itt_discharge = list(data = data_itt_discharge, exposure = "vent_label_ITT", outcome = "hospital_expire_flag"),
  pp_28 = list(data = data_pp_28, exposure = "vent_label_PP", outcome = "28-day mortality"),
  pp_discharge = list(data = data_pp_discharge, exposure = "vent_label_PP", outcome = "hospital_expire_flag"),
  sen_28 = list(data = data_sen_28, exposure = "vent_label_sen", outcome = "28-day mortality"),
  sen_discharge = list(data = data_sen_discharge, exposure = "vent_label_sen", outcome = "hospital_expire_flag")
)

is_binary01 <- function(x) {
  vals <- unique(x[!is.na(x)])
  length(vals) == 2 && all(sort(as.numeric(vals)) %in% c(0, 1))
}

to_binary01 <- function(x) {
  if (is.logical(x)) return(as.integer(x))
  if (is.numeric(x)) return(as.numeric(x))
  x_chr <- trimws(as.character(x))
  x_chr[x_chr %in% c("FALSE", "False", "false", "No", "NO", "no")] <- "0"
  x_chr[x_chr %in% c("TRUE", "True", "true", "Yes", "YES", "yes")] <- "1"
  if (isTRUE(niv_reference)) {
    x_chr[x_chr %in% c("NIV", "niv")] <- "0"
    x_chr[x_chr %in% c("INV", "inv")] <- "1"
  } else {
    x_chr[x_chr %in% c("INV", "inv")] <- "0"
    x_chr[x_chr %in% c("NIV", "niv")] <- "1"
  }
  x_chr[x_chr %in% c("alive", "Alive")] <- "0"
  x_chr[x_chr %in% c("death", "Death")] <- "1"
  suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x_chr))
}

run_psm <- function(df, exposure, outcome, confounders, dataset_name) {
  use_covariates <- intersect(confounders, names(df))
  if (length(use_covariates) == 0) {
    stop(paste("No confounders available for", dataset_name))
  }

  work <- df %>%
    select(all_of(unique(c(exposure, outcome, use_covariates)))) %>%
    filter(
      !is.na(.data[[exposure]]),
      !is.na(.data[[outcome]]),
      if_all(all_of(use_covariates), ~ !is.na(.x))
    )

  if (nrow(work) == 0) {
    stop(paste("No valid rows after filtering for", dataset_name))
  }

  work <- work %>%
    mutate(
      .exposure = to_binary01(.data[[exposure]]),
      .outcome = to_binary01(.data[[outcome]])
    )

  if (!is_binary01(work$.exposure)) {
    stop(paste("Exposure must be binary 0/1 in", dataset_name))
  }

  match_formula <- as.formula(
    paste(".exposure ~", paste(use_covariates, collapse = " + "))
  )

  match_fit <- MatchIt::matchit(
    formula = match_formula,
    data = work,
    method = "nearest",
    distance = "glm",
    ratio = 1,
    replace = FALSE
  )

  matched_data <- MatchIt::match.data(match_fit)
  outcome_is_binary <- is_binary01(matched_data$.outcome)

  if (outcome_is_binary) {
    outcome_model <- glm(.outcome ~ .exposure, data = matched_data, family = binomial(), weights = weights)
    model_out <- broom::tidy(outcome_model, conf.int = TRUE, exponentiate = FALSE)
    model_out_or <- broom::tidy(outcome_model, conf.int = TRUE, exponentiate = TRUE)
    effect_row <- model_out %>%
      filter(term == ".exposure") %>%
      left_join(
        model_out_or %>%
          filter(term == ".exposure") %>%
          transmute(term, OR = estimate, OR_conf.low = conf.low, OR_conf.high = conf.high),
        by = "term"
      ) %>%
      transmute(
        dataset = dataset_name,
        exposure = exposure,
        outcome = outcome,
        measure = "OR",
        outcome_coef = estimate,
        OR = OR,
        OR_conf.low = OR_conf.low,
        OR_conf.high = OR_conf.high,
        estimate = estimate,
        conf.low = conf.low,
        conf.high = conf.high,
        p.value = p.value
      )
  } else {
    outcome_model <- lm(.outcome ~ .exposure, data = matched_data, weights = weights)
    model_out <- broom::tidy(outcome_model, conf.int = TRUE)
    effect_row <- model_out %>%
      filter(term == ".exposure") %>%
      transmute(
        dataset = dataset_name,
        exposure = exposure,
        outcome = outcome,
        measure = "Beta",
        outcome_coef = estimate,
        OR = NA_real_,
        OR_conf.low = NA_real_,
        OR_conf.high = NA_real_,
        estimate = estimate,
        conf.low = conf.low,
        conf.high = conf.high,
        p.value = p.value
      )
  }

  summary_row <- tibble(
    dataset = dataset_name,
    exposure = exposure,
    outcome = outcome,
    n_before = nrow(work),
    n_after = nrow(matched_data),
    treated_after = sum(matched_data$.exposure == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    control_after = sum(matched_data$.exposure == 0, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

  list(
    match_fit = match_fit,
    matched_data = matched_data,
    outcome_model = outcome_model,
    model_output = model_out,
    effect_row = effect_row,
    summary_row = summary_row
  )
}

psm_runs <- lapply(
  names(psm_inputs),
  function(nm) {
    x <- psm_inputs[[nm]]
    run_psm(
      df = x$data,
      exposure = x$exposure,
      outcome = x$outcome,
      confounders = confounders,
      dataset_name = nm
    )
  }
)
names(psm_runs) <- names(psm_inputs)

## Saved outputs
psm_match_models <- lapply(psm_runs, `[[`, "match_fit")
psm_matched_datasets <- lapply(psm_runs, `[[`, "matched_data")
psm_outcome_models <- lapply(psm_runs, `[[`, "outcome_model")

## Tables
psm_results_table <- bind_rows(lapply(psm_runs, `[[`, "summary_row"))
psm_model_output_table <- bind_rows(lapply(psm_runs, `[[`, "effect_row")) %>%
  mutate(
    result_id = paste0(exposure, " | ", outcome)
  )

psm_results_table
psm_model_output_table

## One forest plot for all treatment effects
plot_data <- psm_model_output_table %>%
  filter(measure == "OR") %>%
  left_join(
    psm_results_table %>% select(dataset, n_before, n_after),
    by = "dataset"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    result_label = paste0(result_id, " (n=", n_before, "→", n_after, ")"),
    result_label = factor(result_label, levels = rev(unique(result_label)))
  )

psm_forest_plot <- ggplot(
  plot_data,
  aes(y = result_label, x = OR, xmin = OR_conf.low, xmax = OR_conf.high, color = exposure)
) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_errorbarh(height = 0.16, linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_point(size = 2.8) +
  labs(
    x = "Odds ratio (matched sample)",
    y = NULL,
    color = "Exposure",
    title = "PSM ATT Across All Exposure-Outcome"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14)
  )

ggsave(
  filename = "psm_forest_plot.png",
  plot = psm_forest_plot,
  width = 12,
  height = 8,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 600,
  bg = "white"
)

psm_forest_plot


```



### Doubly Robust IPW

```{r,echo=FALSE}
dr_inputs <- list(
  itt_28 = list(data = data_itt_28, exposure = "vent_label_ITT", outcome = "28-day mortality"),
  itt_discharge = list(data = data_itt_discharge, exposure = "vent_label_ITT", outcome = "hospital_expire_flag"),
  pp_28 = list(data = data_pp_28, exposure = "vent_label_PP", outcome = "28-day mortality"),
  pp_discharge = list(data = data_pp_discharge, exposure = "vent_label_PP", outcome = "hospital_expire_flag"),
  sen_28 = list(data = data_sen_28, exposure = "vent_label_sen", outcome = "28-day mortality"),
  sen_discharge = list(data = data_sen_discharge, exposure = "vent_label_sen", outcome = "hospital_expire_flag")
)

is_binary01 <- function(x) {
  vals <- unique(x[!is.na(x)])
  length(vals) == 2 && all(sort(as.numeric(vals)) %in% c(0, 1))
}

to_binary01 <- function(x) {
  if (is.logical(x)) return(as.integer(x))
  if (is.numeric(x)) return(as.numeric(x))
  x_chr <- trimws(as.character(x))
  x_chr[x_chr %in% c("FALSE", "False", "false", "No", "NO", "no")] <- "0"
  x_chr[x_chr %in% c("TRUE", "True", "true", "Yes", "YES", "yes")] <- "1"
  if (isTRUE(niv_reference)) {
    x_chr[x_chr %in% c("NIV", "niv")] <- "0"
    x_chr[x_chr %in% c("INV", "inv")] <- "1"
  } else {
    x_chr[x_chr %in% c("INV", "inv")] <- "0"
    x_chr[x_chr %in% c("NIV", "niv")] <- "1"
  }
  x_chr[x_chr %in% c("alive", "Alive")] <- "0"
  x_chr[x_chr %in% c("death", "Death")] <- "1"
  suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x_chr))
}

run_dr_ipw <- function(df, exposure, outcome, confounders, dataset_name) {
  use_covariates <- intersect(confounders, names(df))
  if (length(use_covariates) == 0) {
    stop(paste("No confounders available for", dataset_name))
  }

  work <- df %>%
    select(all_of(unique(c(exposure, outcome, use_covariates)))) %>%
    filter(
      !is.na(.data[[exposure]]),
      !is.na(.data[[outcome]]),
      if_all(all_of(use_covariates), ~ !is.na(.x))
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      .exposure = to_binary01(.data[[exposure]]),
      .outcome = to_binary01(.data[[outcome]])
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(.exposure), !is.na(.outcome))

  if (!is_binary01(work$.exposure)) {
    stop(paste("Exposure must be binary 0/1 in", dataset_name))
  }
  if (!is_binary01(work$.outcome)) {
    stop(paste("Outcome must be binary 0/1 in", dataset_name))
  }

  ps_formula <- as.formula(
    paste(".exposure ~", paste(use_covariates, collapse = " + "))
  )
  ps_model <- glm(ps_formula, data = work, family = binomial())

  work <- work %>%
    mutate(
      ps = predict(ps_model, type = "response"),
      ps = pmin(pmax(ps, 0.01), 0.99)
    )

  p_treated <- mean(work$.exposure == 1)
  work <- work %>%
    mutate(
      sw = if_else(
        .exposure == 1,
        p_treated / ps,
        (1 - p_treated) / (1 - ps)
      ),
      sw = pmin(sw, 10)
    )

  dr_formula <- as.formula(
    paste(".outcome ~ .exposure +", paste(use_covariates, collapse = " + "))
  )
  dr_model <- glm(
    dr_formula,
    data = work,
    family = binomial(),
    weights = sw
  )

  dr_model_coef <- broom::tidy(dr_model, conf.int = TRUE, exponentiate = FALSE)
  dr_model_or <- broom::tidy(dr_model, conf.int = TRUE, exponentiate = TRUE)

  effect_row <- dr_model_coef %>%
    filter(term == ".exposure") %>%
    left_join(
      dr_model_or %>%
        filter(term == ".exposure") %>%
        transmute(term, OR = estimate, OR_conf.low = conf.low, OR_conf.high = conf.high),
      by = "term"
    ) %>%
    transmute(
      dataset = dataset_name,
      exposure = exposure,
      outcome = outcome,
      measure = "OR",
      outcome_coef = estimate,
      OR = OR,
      OR_conf.low = OR_conf.low,
      OR_conf.high = OR_conf.high,
      estimate = estimate,
      conf.low = conf.low,
      conf.high = conf.high,
      p.value = p.value
    )

  summary_row <- tibble(
    dataset = dataset_name,
    exposure = exposure,
    outcome = outcome,
    mean_weight = mean(work$sw, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_weight = max(work$sw, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

  list(
    analysis_data = work,
    ps_model = ps_model,
    dr_model = dr_model,
    effect_row = effect_row,
    summary_row = summary_row
  )
}

dr_runs <- lapply(
  names(dr_inputs),
  function(nm) {
    x <- dr_inputs[[nm]]
    run_dr_ipw(
      df = x$data,
      exposure = x$exposure,
      outcome = x$outcome,
      confounders = confounders,
      dataset_name = nm
    )
  }
)
names(dr_runs) <- names(dr_inputs)

## Saved outputs
dr_analysis_datasets <- lapply(dr_runs, `[[`, "analysis_data")
dr_ps_models <- lapply(dr_runs, `[[`, "ps_model")
dr_outcome_models <- lapply(dr_runs, `[[`, "dr_model")

## Tables
dr_results_table <- bind_rows(lapply(dr_runs, `[[`, "summary_row"))
dr_model_output_table <- bind_rows(lapply(dr_runs, `[[`, "effect_row")) %>%
  mutate(
    result_label = paste0(exposure, " | ", outcome),
    result_label = factor(result_label, levels = rev(unique(result_label)))
  )

dr_results_table
dr_model_output_table

## Forest plot for all six treatment effects
dr_forest_plot <- ggplot(
  dr_model_output_table,
  aes(y = result_label, x = OR, xmin = OR_conf.low, xmax = OR_conf.high, color = exposure)
) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_errorbarh(height = 0.16, linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_point(size = 2.8) +
  labs(
    x = "Odds ratio (doubly robust IPW)",
    y = NULL,
    color = "Exposure",
    title = "DR-IPW ATE Across All Exposure-Outcome"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14)
  )

ggsave(
  filename = "dr_ipw_forest_plot.png",
  plot = dr_forest_plot,
  width = 12,
  height = 8,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 600,
  bg = "white"
)

dr_forest_plot

## Build six dataset-level diagnostic plots (PS distribution + weight distribution)
make_ps_weight_plot <- function(df, title_txt) {
  p_ps <- ggplot(df, aes(x = ps, color = factor(.exposure), fill = factor(.exposure))) +
    geom_density(alpha = 0.2, linewidth = 0.9) +
    labs(
      x = "Propensity score",
      y = "Density",
      color = "Exposure",
      fill = "Exposure",
      title = paste0(title_txt, ": PS Distribution")
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("0" = "#4C78A8", "1" = "#E15759"), labels = c("0" = "0", "1" = "1")) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("0" = "#4C78A8", "1" = "#E15759"), labels = c("0" = "0", "1" = "1")) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 10)

  p_wt <- ggplot(df, aes(x = sw, fill = factor(.exposure))) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 40, alpha = 0.6, position = "identity") +
    labs(
      x = "Stabilized weight",
      y = "Count",
      fill = "Exposure",
      title = paste0(title_txt, ": Weight Distribution")
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("0" = "#4C78A8", "1" = "#E15759"), labels = c("0" = "0", "1" = "1")) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 10)

  p_ps + p_wt + patchwork::plot_layout(ncol = 2)
}

diag_plots <- lapply(
  names(dr_analysis_datasets),
  function(nm) make_ps_weight_plot(dr_analysis_datasets[[nm]], nm)
)

names(diag_plots) <- names(dr_analysis_datasets)
dr_diagnostic_plots <- diag_plots

for (nm in names(dr_diagnostic_plots)) {
  print(dr_diagnostic_plots[[nm]])
}

```

### Logistic Regression
```{r logistic_regression, echo=FALSE}
logit_inputs <- list(
  itt_28 = list(data = data_itt_28, exposure = "vent_label_ITT", outcome = "28-day mortality"),
  itt_discharge = list(data = data_itt_discharge, exposure = "vent_label_ITT", outcome = "hospital_expire_flag"),
  pp_28 = list(data = data_pp_28, exposure = "vent_label_PP", outcome = "28-day mortality"),
  pp_discharge = list(data = data_pp_discharge, exposure = "vent_label_PP", outcome = "hospital_expire_flag"),
  sen_28 = list(data = data_sen_28, exposure = "vent_label_sen", outcome = "28-day mortality"),
  sen_discharge = list(data = data_sen_discharge, exposure = "vent_label_sen", outcome = "hospital_expire_flag")
)

to_binary01_logit <- function(x) {
  if (is.logical(x)) return(as.integer(x))
  if (is.numeric(x)) return(as.numeric(x))
  x_chr <- trimws(as.character(x))
  x_chr[x_chr %in% c("FALSE", "False", "false", "No", "NO", "no")] <- "0"
  x_chr[x_chr %in% c("TRUE", "True", "true", "Yes", "YES", "yes")] <- "1"
  if (isTRUE(niv_reference)) {
    x_chr[x_chr %in% c("NIV", "niv")] <- "0"
    x_chr[x_chr %in% c("INV", "inv")] <- "1"
  } else {
    x_chr[x_chr %in% c("INV", "inv")] <- "0"
    x_chr[x_chr %in% c("NIV", "niv")] <- "1"
  }
  x_chr[x_chr %in% c("alive", "Alive")] <- "0"
  x_chr[x_chr %in% c("death", "Death")] <- "1"
  suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x_chr))
}

is_binary01_logit <- function(x) {
  vals <- unique(x[!is.na(x)])
  length(vals) == 2 && all(sort(as.numeric(vals)) %in% c(0, 1))
}

run_logit <- function(df, exposure, outcome, confounders, dataset_name) {
  use_covariates <- intersect(confounders, names(df))
  if (length(use_covariates) == 0) {
    stop(paste("No confounders available for", dataset_name))
  }

  work <- df %>%
    select(all_of(unique(c(exposure, outcome, use_covariates)))) %>%
    filter(
      !is.na(.data[[exposure]]),
      !is.na(.data[[outcome]]),
      if_all(all_of(use_covariates), ~ !is.na(.x))
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      .exposure = to_binary01_logit(.data[[exposure]]),
      .outcome = to_binary01_logit(.data[[outcome]])
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(.exposure), !is.na(.outcome))

  if (!is_binary01_logit(work$.exposure)) {
    stop(paste("Exposure must be binary 0/1 in", dataset_name))
  }
  if (!is_binary01_logit(work$.outcome)) {
    stop(paste("Outcome must be binary 0/1 in", dataset_name))
  }

  model_formula <- as.formula(
    paste(".outcome ~ .exposure +", paste(use_covariates, collapse = " + "))
  )
  fit <- glm(model_formula, data = work, family = binomial())

  coef_tbl <- broom::tidy(fit, conf.int = TRUE, exponentiate = FALSE)
  or_tbl <- broom::tidy(fit, conf.int = TRUE, exponentiate = TRUE)

  effect_row <- coef_tbl %>%
    filter(term == ".exposure") %>%
    left_join(
      or_tbl %>%
        filter(term == ".exposure") %>%
        transmute(term, OR = estimate, OR_conf.low = conf.low, OR_conf.high = conf.high),
      by = "term"
    ) %>%
    transmute(
      dataset = dataset_name,
      exposure = exposure,
      outcome = outcome,
      n = nrow(work),
      outcome_coef = estimate,
      coef_conf.low = conf.low,
      coef_conf.high = conf.high,
      OR = OR,
      OR_conf.low = OR_conf.low,
      OR_conf.high = OR_conf.high,
      p.value = p.value
    )

  list(
    model = fit,
    model_output = coef_tbl,
    effect_row = effect_row
  )
}

logit_runs <- lapply(
  names(logit_inputs),
  function(nm) {
    x <- logit_inputs[[nm]]
    run_logit(
      df = x$data,
      exposure = x$exposure,
      outcome = x$outcome,
      confounders = confounders,
      dataset_name = nm
    )
  }
)
names(logit_runs) <- names(logit_inputs)

logit_models <- lapply(logit_runs, `[[`, "model")
logit_results_table <- bind_rows(lapply(logit_runs, `[[`, "effect_row")) %>%
  mutate(
    result_label = paste0(exposure, " | ", outcome),
    result_label = factor(result_label, levels = rev(unique(result_label)))
  )

logit_results_table

logit_forest_plot <- ggplot(
  logit_results_table,
  aes(y = result_label, x = OR, xmin = OR_conf.low, xmax = OR_conf.high, color = exposure)
) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.6) +
  geom_errorbarh(height = 0.16, linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_point(size = 2.8) +
  labs(
    x = "Odds ratio (logistic regression)",
    y = NULL,
    color = "Exposure",
    title = "Logistic Regression Treatment Effects Across All Exposure-Outcome Datasets"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12)

ggsave(
  filename = "logistic_regression_forest_plot.png",
  plot = logit_forest_plot,
  width = 12,
  height = 8,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 600,
  bg = "white"
)

logit_forest_plot
```

### temp
```{r temp, echo=FALSE}
if (!exists("psm_matched_datasets")) {
  stop("`psm_matched_datasets` not found. Run the PSM chunk first.")
}
if (!exists("dr_analysis_datasets")) {
  stop("`dr_analysis_datasets` not found. Run the Doubly Robust IPW chunk first.")
}

## Outcome distribution in matched samples (PSM)
psm_outcome_distribution <- bind_rows(
  lapply(names(psm_matched_datasets), function(nm) {
    psm_matched_datasets[[nm]] %>%
      count(.exposure, .outcome, name = "n") %>%
      mutate(
        dataset = nm,
        method = "PSM",
        pct = n / sum(n)
      )
  })
) %>%
  select(method, dataset, .exposure, .outcome, n, pct)

## Outcome distribution in DR-IPW analysis data (raw + weighted)
ipw_outcome_distribution <- bind_rows(
  lapply(names(dr_analysis_datasets), function(nm) {
    raw_tbl <- dr_analysis_datasets[[nm]] %>%
      count(.exposure, .outcome, name = "n") %>%
      mutate(
        dataset = nm,
        method = "DR-IPW_raw",
        weighted_n = NA_real_,
        pct = n / sum(n),
        weighted_pct = NA_real_
      )

    wt_tbl <- dr_analysis_datasets[[nm]] %>%
      group_by(.exposure, .outcome) %>%
      summarise(weighted_n = sum(sw, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
      mutate(
        dataset = nm,
        method = "DR-IPW_weighted",
        n = NA_real_,
        pct = NA_real_,
        weighted_pct = weighted_n / sum(weighted_n)
      )

    bind_rows(raw_tbl, wt_tbl)
  })
) %>%
  select(method, dataset, .exposure, .outcome, n, weighted_n, pct, weighted_pct)

psm_outcome_distribution
ipw_outcome_distribution
```

### check
```{r check, echo=FALSE}
check_inputs <- list(
  itt_28 = list(data = data_itt_28, exposure = "vent_label_ITT", outcome = "28-day mortality"),
  itt_discharge = list(data = data_itt_discharge, exposure = "vent_label_ITT", outcome = "hospital_expire_flag"),
  pp_28 = list(data = data_pp_28, exposure = "vent_label_PP", outcome = "28-day mortality"),
  pp_discharge = list(data = data_pp_discharge, exposure = "vent_label_PP", outcome = "hospital_expire_flag"),
  sen_28 = list(data = data_sen_28, exposure = "vent_label_sen", outcome = "28-day mortality"),
  sen_discharge = list(data = data_sen_discharge, exposure = "vent_label_sen", outcome = "hospital_expire_flag")
)

to_binary01_check <- function(x) {
  if (is.logical(x)) return(as.integer(x))
  if (is.numeric(x)) return(as.numeric(x))
  x_chr <- trimws(as.character(x))
  x_chr[x_chr %in% c("FALSE", "False", "false", "No", "NO", "no")] <- "0"
  x_chr[x_chr %in% c("TRUE", "True", "true", "Yes", "YES", "yes")] <- "1"
  if (isTRUE(niv_reference)) {
    x_chr[x_chr %in% c("NIV", "niv")] <- "0"
    x_chr[x_chr %in% c("INV", "inv")] <- "1"
  } else {
    x_chr[x_chr %in% c("INV", "inv")] <- "0"
    x_chr[x_chr %in% c("NIV", "niv")] <- "1"
  }
  x_chr[x_chr %in% c("alive", "Alive")] <- "0"
  x_chr[x_chr %in% c("death", "Death")] <- "1"
  suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x_chr))
}

check_one_var <- function(df, var_name, dataset_name, role) {
  raw <- df[[var_name]]
  conv <- to_binary01_check(raw)

  raw_non_missing_n <- sum(!is.na(raw))
  conv_na_from_non_missing <- sum(!is.na(raw) & is.na(conv))
  conv_non01_n <- sum(!is.na(conv) & !(conv %in% c(0, 1)))

  raw_levels <- paste(sort(unique(as.character(raw[!is.na(raw)]))), collapse = ", ")
  converted_levels <- paste(sort(unique(as.character(conv[!is.na(conv)]))), collapse = ", ")

  tibble(
    dataset = dataset_name,
    role = role,
    variable = var_name,
    raw_non_missing_n = raw_non_missing_n,
    converted_na_from_non_missing_n = conv_na_from_non_missing,
    converted_non01_n = conv_non01_n,
    risk_flag = conv_na_from_non_missing > 0 | conv_non01_n > 0,
    raw_levels = raw_levels,
    converted_levels = converted_levels
  )
}

recoding_risk_check <- bind_rows(
  lapply(names(check_inputs), function(nm) {
    x <- check_inputs[[nm]]
    bind_rows(
      check_one_var(x$data, x$exposure, nm, "exposure"),
      check_one_var(x$data, x$outcome, nm, "outcome")
    )
  })
)

recoding_risk_check
```
